SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLEN, CARRIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SALLY, RIZVI (RIZVI SALLY, INDIVIDUALLY DBA AAMCO (FRANCHISE) AAMCO CORPORATION (SERVED ON GC) JAMES GONIEA, ESQ (AAMCO CORPORATION (SERVED ON GC) JAMES GONIEA, ESQ.
